ddls:
CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "tech_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that developed the technology */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the technology */,
  "date_introduced" TEXT /* Date when the technology was introduced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the technology */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the technology's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the factor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the factor's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators_of_reduction" (
  "ir_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IR */,
  "ir_name" TEXT /* Name of the IR */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IR */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the factor the IR belongs to */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the IR */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the IR's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation criterion */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the evaluation criterion */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the criterion */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the criterion's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology being evaluated */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation criterion used */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained by the technology for the criterion */,
  "weighted_sum" REAL /* Weighted sum of scores for the technology */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technology_factors" (
  "tech_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology-factor relationship */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the factor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technology_factors_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technology_factors_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ir_scores" (
  "ir_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IR score */,
  "ir_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IR */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained by the technology for the IR */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the scoring */,
  "scoring_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was given */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the score */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ir_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ir_scores_ir_id FOREIGN KEY ("ir_id") REFERENCES indicators_of_reduction ("ir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ir_scores_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ir_scores_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, evaluator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria_weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the criterion */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the weight becomes effective */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the weight was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criteria_weights_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ir_weights" (
  "ir_weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IR weight */,
  "ir_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the IR */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the IR */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the weight becomes effective */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the weight was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ir_weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ir_weights_ir_id FOREIGN KEY ("ir_id") REFERENCES indicators_of_reduction ("ir_id")
)
